events.description: BYD reports record FY2024 revenue of 777 billion yuan and net profit of 40.3 billion yuan (+34% YoY) with 4.27 million NEV sales.
BYD continues international expansion with new factories in Thailand, Brazil, and Hungary with no major strategy revision.

summary: The backtest reveals a high degree of accuracy in the predicted risk factors, particularly regarding financial performance and strategic execution. Predictions regarding the tension between cash flow strain and profit growth (PEER002, COM001) were strongly validated by the record financial results in gt_001. Similarly, the anticipated expansion into new manufacturing hubs like Hungary and Brazil (IND001, COM003) was confirmed in gt_002, indicating that the identified risks were either successfully mitigated or were part of the expected strategic trajectory rather than unforeseen failures.
